global_description: Small insect with a compact, oval body, covered in fine hairs. Predominantly yellow and black striped pattern, with translucent wings and six legs. The head features large compound eyes and antennae, while the abdomen ends with a stinger.

part_details.head: Small with large compound eyes and antennae
part_details.thorax: Middle segment with wings and legs attached

spatial_relations: Head at front, abdomen at rear
